sourceRef.citation: Maldonado Saavedra, Luis, Fernando et al. 2026

statement.en: Sensitivity Analysis of a RFRFR Continuum Parallel Robot

proposer: Maldonado Saavedra, Luis, Fernando, Quentin Peyron, Sébastien Briot et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future date indicates provisional metadata) describing a specific robotic system sensitivity analysis. The technical claims are not yet peer-validated. The work appears to be original engineering research on a parallel robot configuration (RFRFR = Revolute-Prismatic-Revolute-Revolute kinematics), but without access to the full text, the axioms embedded in the methodology cannot be fully evaluated. Sensitivity analysis itself is mathematically sound, but the system-specific claims remain provisional.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 微小な回転が並列構造の先端位置にどう響くか、指数的に絡み合う関係を見ている。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 多数の腕が同じ点へ収束する敏感な構造—わずかな偏差が全体の振る舞いを急変させる。
